question: Where did I buy my new bookshelf from?

retrieval_results.context:
User is content with having books organized and within reach, appreciates how a simple new bookshelf can make a big difference, and will stick with reading for now.
User recently rearranged living room furniture by swapping the couch and armchair, creating more space, and installed a new IKEA bookshelf, which helped declutter their book collection and they are very happy with it.
User donated old books to the local library, feeling great about decluttering, and is looking for apps to help keep track of their book collection.
User is actively seeking to improve organization, has recently organized their closet, and plans to use the Closet or Stylebook apps to further declutter and organize their closet.
User is considering organizing their living room and wants tips on creating more space and giving it a modern look.
